# Three.js GLTFLoader

`gltf-loader-global.js` bundles the `GLTFLoader` and the required
`BufferGeometryUtils` helper from Three.js r160, adapted at build time to use
the game's existing global `THREE` instance.

- Source: https://github.com/mrdoob/three.js/tree/r160/examples/jsm
- License: MIT — https://github.com/mrdoob/three.js/blob/r160/LICENSE
